params.prompt: fine pixel art, 16-bit hi-bit style, point-and-click adventure game background, in the style of classic SCUMM adventures, painterly dithering, muted palette, moody dim interior lighting, flat side-on view like a theater stage set, back wall parallel to the picture plane, floor running level across the bottom edge, room seen straight-on from inside, empty room, no people, no animals, no text, no watermark.
